chapter_context.summary: Ahaziah reigns wickedly under Athaliah; he is slain during Jehu's purge; Athaliah massacres royal heirs, but infant Joash is hidden.

outline.text: Ahaziah's Brief Wicked Reign Under Athaliah's Counsel
outline.explanation: This section focuses on Ahaziah's Brief Wicked Reign Under Athaliah's Counsel (22:1-4), highlighting its theological significance and showing how it develops the central message of 2 Chronicles.

outline.text: Ahaziah Joins Joram Against Hazael; Slain During Jehu's Purge
outline.explanation: This section focuses on Ahaziah Joins Joram Against Hazael; Slain During Jehu's Purge (22:5-9), highlighting its theological significance and showing how it develops the central message of 2 Chronicles.

outline.text: Athaliah Murders Royal Seed; Joash Saved by Jehoshabeath
outline.explanation: This section focuses on Athaliah Murders Royal Seed; Joash Saved by Jehoshabeath (22:10-12), highlighting its theological significance and showing how it develops the central message of 2 Chronicles.

key_themes.title: The Temple Centered Kingdom
key_themes.description: The presence of God's glory in the Temple is the absolute center of national blessing and life.

key_themes.title: Immediate Retribution and Reform
key_themes.description: Good kings who seek the LORD experience immediate victory and peace, while unfaithfulness leads to immediate warning and exile.

devotional.question: How do the events of Chapter 22 prompt you to humble yourself, seek God's face, and turn away from compromise?
What practical reforms can you make in your daily walk to ensure your heart is dedicated to God?

cultural_historical.title: The Levitical Worship System
cultural_historical.text: Unlike the Book of Kings, Chronicles highlights the roles of singers, Levites, and liturgical musicians in the temple's daily administration.
